CustomField.description: Select your priority : Minor = Nice to have, not urgent Major = Has to be resolved quickly Blocking = Urgent / Blocking to do my work (depending of the issue, administration can change the level of priority)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select your priority : Minor = Nice to have, not urgent Major = Has to be resolved quickly Blocking = Urgent / Blocking to do my work (depending of the issue, administration can change the level of priority)
CustomField.label: Priority / Severity
